description: Generate or update a project architecture SVG diagram by scanning the live project structure

evals.prompt: How do I generate an architecture diagram for my project?
evals.expected_output: Architecture diagram generation process and command
assertions: Shows diagram generation command or method

evals.prompt: How can I customize the appearance of the generated architecture diagram?
evals.expected_output: Customization options for colors, layout, and component styling

evals.prompt: How do I update the architecture diagram when my project structure changes?
What types of components can the architecture diagram detect and visualize?
evals.expected_output: Component detection capabilities: services, databases, APIs, etc.

evals.prompt: What output formats are supported for architecture diagrams?
evals.expected_output: Supported output formats: SVG, PNG, PDF, etc.
